name: 16th Street Park
description: 16th Street Park is a place to play pickleball in Port Huron, MI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Public courts free to use but reservations take priority.

name: Clay Township Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Clay Township Pickleball Courts in Algonac, MI! There are 3 outdoor acrylic and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Clyde Township Park
description: Clyde Township Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clyde, MI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
hours: Monday - Friday, 8:00 am - 4:00 pm Click HERE for email . Clyde Township is located in northeast St. Clair County, Michigan. We are a zoned community and permits are required. name: East China Township Park
description: East China Township Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in East China, MI. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Marysville Park Pickleball
description: Marysville Park Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Marysville, MI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Pickleball 365
description: CushionX courts which are CushionX mat installed over the base.

name: Port Huron Tennis House
description: Port Huron Tennis House is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port Huron, MI. There are 2 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Rock Church Pickleball Club
description: Rock Church Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Fair Haven, MI. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: SERV
description: Come play pickleball at SERV in Atkins, MI! There are 3 indoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Washington Life Center
description: Washington Life Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Marine City, MI. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: YMCA Of The Blue Water Area
description: YMCA Of The Blue Water Area is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port Huron, MI. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
hours: Mon - Fri 6:00 AM - 9:00 PM Saturday 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Sunday CLOSED Pools close one half-hour prior to staffed hours close.
